_notes: Watercraft Pack: near-real-scale authoring (speedboat 3.4 units). Scale 2 puts the cargo container at real 20 ft proportions and ship-small at ~21 m. Boat launch ramps are drivable by cars -> weld. Vessels are static dressing props (hull); the playable boat is a hand-built scene (M6). Buoy keeps its authored waterline origin (raw + no collision).
